calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TRILLER, INC.'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

The unopposed motion by Counsel Farhad Novian and Novian & Novian LLP, counsel for Triller, Inc., to be relieved as counsel is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the motion is granted.

No later than 8:30 am on 9/16/2025, Moving Parties must lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org an updated proposed order on MC-053 with accurate information inserted, where appropriate.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar May-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Sensortower, Inc.'s Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal And For Entry Of Judgment is GRANTED IN PART.

Good cause appearing, the court sets aside the dismissal without prejudice previously filed in this case and authorizes entry of judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant Triller, Inc. in the amount of $541,020.

The court cannot enter judgment as requested against Twiller Platform Co. This was not the party named in the suit and it is not a party to the Stipulation for Entry of Judgment.

Plaintiff is admonished that it is not free on its own to change the caption. A change to the caption, including a change of defendant, requires a court order. All pleadings and papers filed in this action must be filed using the appropriate caption.

Plaintiff will have to follow the Code regarding submission of a proposed judgment. Going forward, best practice is to submit the proposed judgment with the moving papers.

Order for Entry of Judgment Sign.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
